data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention biometric data collection at all, so there are no specific limits or justifications provided for this data category.

collected.policy_snippet: Food and Activity Diary Data. Certain features of our Services allow you to voluntarily share information about your dietary habits and activities you engage in. This includes your: ... Food, drink, and medications you consume ... Information related to any physiological conditions
collected.purpose: To give you the best support, provide you with our Services, and enhance and personalize our Services including providing suggestions and recommendations.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy describes broad collection of personal information including sensitive health data without explicit statements limiting collection to only what is strictly necessary or providing specific justification for each data type's necessity.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the Policy including legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.

shared.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal shares your information with service providers, business partners, and other third parties to provide you with our Services. We also share your information with marketing and advertising partners to show you relevant content and advertising.
shared.purpose: To provide you with our Services and show you relevant content and advertising.

health_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Health data such as medications and physiological conditions is collected and may be shared with third parties including marketing partners. Retention periods are not clearly defined, and data may be transferred internationally to jurisdictions with different privacy laws.

collected.policy_snippet: Certain connected devices, such as heart rate monitors, Continuous Glucose Monitoring devices, activity trackers, exercise equipment, scales, and/or wearables, that integrate with the Services, may allow us to collect Food and Activity Diary Data with your permission.
collected.purpose: To provide Services, personalize content and features to your interests and goals, and support healthier habits.
collected.legal_basis: Permission (consent) for connected device data; provision of Services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not explicitly state a data minimization principle for collection or describe concrete limits on the types of physiological data collected beyond functional descriptions.

stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the Policy and satisfy legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy

shared.policy_snippet: We disclose personal information to the categories of recipients described below:
shared.purpose: To provide Services, show relevant content and advertising, and measure effectiveness.

physiological_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: MyFitnessPal collects sensitive physiological data such as heart rate and sleep patterns, which may be shared with marketing and advertising partners. Data is retained for an indefinite period defined as 'necessary' and may be transferred internationally to jurisdictions with different privacy laws.

collected.policy_snippet: Body measurements (e.g., height, weight, and BMI); Progress photos you may choose to provide; general location information (country/zip code)
collected.purpose: To provide fitness and nutrition tracking services, allow users to track their physical progress, body composition, and location-based features

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy lists extensive physical data collection including body measurements, photos, and location without clear justification for why each type is necessary or meaningful limits on collection scope

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the Policy including legal or reporting requirements

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information to third parties that provide business, professional, or technical support services to us and/or perform functions on our behalf to provide the Services.
shared.purpose: To provide Services through business partners, service providers, marketing and advertising partners, and analytics providers

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data including body measurements, progress photos, and location information is collected and may be shared with third parties including international transfers to countries with different privacy laws. Users can request deletion but there is no automatic deletion policy based on inactivity.

collected.policy_snippet: Food and Activity Diary Data. Certain features of our Services allow you to voluntarily share information about your dietary habits and activities you engage in. This includes your: Dietary habits; ... Lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data);
collected.purpose: To give you the best support, provide you with our Services, and improve the quality of our Services.

shared.purpose: To provide Services, show relevant content and advertising, and improve quality of Services.
